final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic aerial photo of a modern international metropolis core business district at night, shot from a high-altitude drone perspective.

Style/medium: drone aerial long-exposure photography, cyberpunk color grading in the spirit of Blade Runner 2049 and Ghost in the Shell cityscapes, high contrast, photorealistic
Composition: extreme high-altitude bird's-eye view looking straight down and slightly angled, wide-angle lens, full-frame coverage of the urban grid, landmark supertall tower anchored at center frame
Subject: dense cluster of skyscrapers with glass curtain walls flickering in multicolored lights; a central iconic supertall tower with rooftop searchlights sweeping the night sky; elevated highways threading through the city with long-exposure red-and-white light trails forming vein-like streaks; a harbor in the distance with massive cruise ships moored at dock; neon advertisement billboards casting colorful light spill onto low clouds
Scene/backdrop: nighttime megacity, core CBD, harbor visible at far edge, overcast sky tinted by reflected neon glow
Lighting/mood: dominant blue-violet ambient from glass towers, warm amber-white vehicle light trails as contrast, scattered magenta and cyan neon billboard halos, high-contrast dramatic mood with deep shadow pools between buildings
Color palette: blue-violet as primary base, electric cyan and magenta neon as accents, warm white-orange light trails cutting across the cool field, deep near-black shadows in street canyons
Materials/textures: reflective glass curtain walls with individual lit window grids, smooth asphalt highways with motion-blur light streaks, water surface in harbor reflecting tower lights
Avoid: daytime sky, soft pastel tones, low-contrast flat grading, missing light trails, generic stock-photo skyline, watermark, deformed building geometry
